title: Betfair Prediction/Value League Scientific Collaboration 4
thesis: Evolve parallel probability models and policy gates until the best value-betting league earns execution rights. This variant fuses microstructure researcher guidance with signal processing/neuroscience researcher, control/rl researcher to test order-book stress, queue pressure, and execution-quality asymmetry; multi-timescale filtering, burst detection, and low-latency state transitions; feedback-aware thresholding and action policies that stay robust under execution drift.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
